description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: On the main donation page, make a one-time credit-card gift to an ocean campaign working in Asia using the second global one-time preset amount and enable the option to cover processing fees.

target_names: $35 – supports shoreline cleanups and community education sessions

tasks.instruction: Start a monthly donation to a forest campaign whose description focuses on planting and nurturing trees in degraded landscapes worldwide, choosing the lowest monthly preset whose impact text says it plants at least 20 trees per month, set the charge date to the 5th, and allow your name to be shown publicly.

target_names: $40/month – plants 20 trees each month in forest restoration projects

tasks.name: Start a monthly donation to a forest campaign whose description focuses on planting and nurturing trees in degraded landscapes worldwide, choosing the lowest monthly preset whose impact text says it plants at least 20 trees per month, set the charge date to the 5th, and allow your name to be shown publicly.

tasks.instruction: From the climate campaigns list, compare the first two results by their programs-spending percentage and make a one-time donation using the fourth global one-time preset amount to the one with the higher programs percentage, opting to receive receipts by email only.

target_names: $50 – accelerates climate policy research and advocacy outreach

tasks.name: From the climate campaigns list, compare the first two results by their programs-spending percentage and make a one-time donation using the fourth global one-time preset amount to the one with the higher programs percentage, opting to receive receipts by email only.

tasks.instruction: Make a one-time tribute donation to a general-support campaign using the third global one-time preset amount, mark it as an “in honor of” gift, select a forest-themed e-card, and schedule the card to be sent exactly one week from today.

target_names: $40 – restores damaged habitats for wildlife and coastal ecosystems

tasks.name: Make a one-time tribute donation to a general-support campaign using the third global one-time preset amount, mark it as an “in honor of” gift, select a forest-themed e-card, and schedule the card to be sent exactly one week from today.

tasks.instruction: On the main donation form, use the employer match search to select an active employer whose name begins with “Green,” indicate that a match is expected, then make a one-time donation using the fifth global one-time preset amount to a climate campaign centered on policy research and advocacy while opting out of the email newsletter.

target_names: $75 – funds grassroots organizing to protect vulnerable communities

tasks.name: On the main donation form, use the employer match search to select an active employer whose name begins with “Green,” indicate that a match is expected, then make a one-time donation using the fifth global one-time preset amount to a climate campaign centered on policy research and advocacy while opting out of the email newsletter.
tasks.description: On the main donation form, use the employer match search to select an active employer whose name begins with “Green,” indicate that a match is expected, then make a one-time donation using the fifth global one-time preset amount to a climate campaign centered on policy research and advocacy while opting out of the email newsletter.

tasks.instruction: In your donor account, find your active monthly general-support recurring donation and edit it so that its amount matches the third global monthly preset, change its designation to a climate policy campaign, and set the charge date to the 1st of each month.
tasks.name: In your donor account, find your active monthly general-support recurring donation and edit it so that its amount matches the third global monthly preset, change its designation to a climate policy campaign, and set the charge date to the 1st of each month.

tasks.instruction: On the campaigns page, sort by ending soonest, identify the first climate-category campaign whose time-left label shows at least 3 days remaining, and make a one-time donation to it using the fifth global one-time preset amount with both email and SMS updates enabled.

target_names: $75 – funds grassroots organizing to protect vulnerable communities

tasks.name: On the campaigns page, sort by ending soonest, identify the first climate-category campaign whose time-left label shows at least 3 days remaining, and make a one-time donation to it using the fifth global one-time preset amount with both email and SMS updates enabled.

tasks.instruction: Using the multi-designation donation form, create two one-time designations—one for a global ocean cleanup project and one for a fund that protects existing forests—set the ocean amount equal to the second global one-time preset and the forest amount equal to the first global one-time preset so their total matches the one-time preset whose impact text suggests splitting across multiple campaigns, and pay via bank transfer.

target_names: $25 – helps remove plastic waste from rivers feeding our oceans
$35 – supports shoreline cleanups and community education sessions
$60 – can be split across multiple campaigns to maximize impact

tasks.name: Using the multi-designation donation form, create two one-time designations—one for a global ocean cleanup project and one for a fund that protects existing forests—set the ocean amount equal to the second global one-time preset and the forest amount equal to the first global one-time preset so their total matches the one-time preset whose impact text suggests splitting across multiple campaigns, and pay via bank transfer.
tasks.description: Using the multi-designation donation form, create two one-time designations—one for a global ocean cleanup project and one for a fund that protects existing forests—set the ocean amount equal to the second global one-time preset and the forest amount equal to the first global one-time preset so their total matches the one-time preset whose impact text suggests splitting across multiple campaigns, and pay via bank transfer.

tasks.instruction: From the membership page, join the lowest-priced monthly membership tier that includes a printed annual impact report, leaving its default amount unchanged and choosing to have your name displayed publicly.
